payload.description: MTA agency presenting the Bronx-Flushing-Jamaica SBS open house presentation
DOT co-presents and makes presentations with MTA to Community Boards and stakeholders about design and implementation

payload.description: 49% of Q44 riders' destinations are in Flushing or Jamaica; bus lanes in those locations will save time for Bronx Q44 SBS riders
